about.heading: About me
about.p1: Software Engineer with a strong focus on UX / UI Design. I create digital solutions that are useful, simple, and user-centered.
about.p2: I combine design, business, and technology to build clear, efficient, and lasting products. My approach starts with understanding users and translating their needs into intuitive experiences.
about.p3: Currently pursuing an Engineering degree in Software Engineering & Databases at the École Nationale d'Informatique.
